_metadata.name: YARA IOC Payload Triage
_metadata.description: Authorized payload triage workflow that scans pasted file or artifact content with YARA rules and writes a prioritized IOC match report.
_metadata.author: sentris-team

manifest.name: YARA IOC Payload Triage
manifest.description: Scan authorized payload content with YARA rules and produce an IOC triage report.
manifest.author: sentris-team

graph.name: YARA IOC Payload Triage
graph.description: YARA-based IOC triage for authorized payloads, suspicious responses, and collected artifacts.

runtimeInputs.label: Payload label
runtimeInputs.description: File name, URL, response label, or artifact name for the scanned content.

runtimeInputs.label: Payload content
runtimeInputs.description: Authorized payload, response body, file text, or artifact content to scan with YARA.

runtimeInputs.label: YARA rules
runtimeInputs.description: YARA rule definitions. Replace the default fixture rule with engagement-specific IOC rules.

runtimeInputs.label: Authorization notes
runtimeInputs.description: Program scope, artifact origin, or handling constraints for the scanned payload.
